name_en: French 🇫🇷 Luxury Brand ➖🌟 Celine "Tabou Clutch Full Calfskin Handbag"!
name_cn:
French 🇫🇷 Luxury Brand ➖🌟 Celine "Tabou Clutch Full Calfskin Handbag"!
This style fits large smartphones like the Plus. Gold metal hardware. Shoulder carry or handheld. Flap with decorative lock, snap closure. 1 main compartment, 1 interior flat pocket
With leather shoulder strap, leather handle 7.5cm long
Model: 101593 size: 18*8*5cm
